title: Volkswagen Vehicle Configuration
description: A vehicle configuration representing a specific combination of type (trim/engine variant) and selected options in a country market.

typeId.description: UUID of the base vehicle type (trim level and engine variant).

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-2 market identifier where this configuration applies.

configId.description: Optional session identifier for resuming a saved configuration.

selectedOptions.description: UUIDs of currently selected configuration options (colors, wheels, packages, etc.).

buildable.description: Whether this combination of options is a buildable vehicle.

VehicleType.description: A specific trim/engine variant of a vehicle model.

Option.description: A configurable option for a vehicle type.
